candidates.why: Net top-line revenue excluding excise duties; matches Total Revenue exactly and is the cleanest primary revenue label.
Gross revenue including excise duties, not preferred because REVT should use net sales/top-line when a cleaner net revenue line exists.
Also a valid top-line revenue label and matches Revenue numerically; useful as fallback if label changes over time.
Expense line, not revenue.

COGS subcomponent, not revenue.

candidates.why: Direct cost line corresponding to revenue; best match for COGS.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Cost of Revenue
candidates.why: Only a subcomponent of COGS, not the full COGS line.
Only a subcomponent of COGS, not the full COGS line.
Duplicate capitalization variant of the same concept; less preferred because Cost of sales already exists.
Inventory asset, not income statement COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the full direct cost line rather than subcomponents or duplicate capitalization variant.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component.
Only a subcomponent of administrative expenses, so not preferred when the broader line exists.
Likely a subcomponent/balancing subset beneath Administrative expenses, not the broadest admin line.
Generic overhead bucket but preview is empty and less specific than available admin/distribution lines.
Potential SG&A concept but preview is empty and a more specific populated distribution line exists.
Generic/empty label and less precise than Administrative expenses.
D&A/amortization should be excluded from XSGA_COMPONENTS.
Overhead-related compensation component that may sit within SG&A; reasonable to include as SG&A component.

variables.notes: Candidate list clearly misses the important SG&A component row 'Sales and distribution expenses', which is present in the sheet and should be included. Because no explicit combined SG&A row exists, I selected major overhead buckets: Sales and distribution expenses and Administrative expenses. I also included 'Research centres' in XSGA_COMPONENTS because it appears to be a separate R&D operating expense line not obviously embedded in the selected SG&A buckets, and PROF uses (XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD). 'Share-based payments' was included as an overhead compensation component. Manual review recommended to confirm whether share-based payments and research centres are already embedded in the broader expense lines in this specific data source. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Sales and distribution expenses, [Income Statement] Research centres

candidates.why: Only populated and clearly research-related expense line; best dedicated R&D proxy.
Direct R&D label exists but preview is empty; acceptable fallback if populated in other years.
Total R&D label exists but preview is empty; fallback behind more specific research lines.

variables.notes: Research centres is the best populated dedicated R&D line. Included other R&D labels as lower-priority fallbacks in case label usage changes across years.

candidates.why: Too broad/generic and appears empty; not preferred when direct interest line exists.
Broader finance cost line; valid fallback if direct interest expense is unavailable.
Direct interest expense line; best match for XINT.
Offset/adjustment, not the main reported interest expense.
Subset of interest expense only, not preferred as primary XINT.
Generic direct interest label but preview empty; lower-priority fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Lease-interest subset only, not full interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the direct interest expense line first, then broader finance costs only as fallback.

candidates.why: OCI/equity adjustment, not book equity.
Parent/shareholder equity excluding non-controlling interests; best BE choice under the equity rule.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred because BE should exclude MIB when possible.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

variables.notes: Selected parent/shareholder equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation, not balance sheet minority equity; less preferred.
Direct balance sheet NCI line; best match for MIB.
Equivalent balance sheet minority interest label; useful fallback if label changes.

variables.notes: Use balance sheet non-controlling interest line first; minority interest kept as fallback synonym.
